column2: Hold with Stonefield for bread flour through the holidays for reliability. Move all purpose to Mill Brook on a trial 40 bag order in January. Do not switch the wedding cake flour during season.
All purpose at Mill Brook saves about $2.40 a bag. At roughly 35 bags a month that is about $84 a month, near half the food cost overshoot.
